reforms.description: The ERP special fund and specialized federal credit institutes provide grants and subsidized credits for small and medium-sized enterprises, housing, and municipal infrastructure investments, amounting to DM 20 billion by the end of 1991.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support to small and medium-sized enterprises, the initiative aims to enhance their capacity for innovation and investment, thereby contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Preferential credits had been extended to the tune of DM 20 billion by the end of 1991.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant financial commitment to support SMEs, which are crucial for innovation and job creation in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The ERP special fund and the specialised federal credit institutes, i.e., the Kreditanstalt für Wiederaufbau and the Deutsche Ausgleichsbank, grant and subsidise credits for small and medium-sized enterprises, for housing, and for municipal infrastructure investments.
